shortDescription.default: SPFx launcher for fast resource booking with category and site filters.

longDescription.default: Reserva rapida centraliza accesos a reservas de salas, puestos, parking o equipamiento. Consume SharePoint list, same-origin JSON or static config, validates booking links and renders loading, empty, partial and error states explicitly.

features.title: Reserva rápida
features.description: Activa el web part de reserva rápida de recursos frecuentes.
